creator: corky1951@comcast.net
text:
The failure in the build of rpm5 was due to the fact that beecrypt now
uses OpenMP by default.  

I'm attaching a revised patch for the upgrade of the beecrypt port which
adds a knob WITH_OPENMP.  This knob should be left undefined if planning
to use the current version of the rpm5 port.  (I have exchanged email
with the maintainer of that port, so he is aware of the issue.)

Note that the rpm5 port currently has a build dependency on a specific
version of the beecrypt library.  I have tested it with this new
version, and it builds OK as long as WITH_OPENMP is not defined.  So I
am submitting a separate PR to replace the dependency on beecrypt.10
with just plain beecrypt.
